news.title: OpenAI's data center pivot underscores Wall Street spending concerns ahead of IPO
news.summary: OpenAI has moved away from an ambitious agreement with Nvidia. As OpenAI gears up for a potential IPO, it's outlined a more tempered infrastructure strategy.

news.title: Trump threatens to deploy ICE agents to airports if DHS shutdown doesn't end, while Elon Musk offers to cover TSA agents' pay
news.summary: President Trump said ICE agents handling airport security would arrest immigrants who are in the U.S. illegally. President Trump claimed ICE agents handled airport security will arrest immigrants in the United States illegally.

news.title: Trump threatens attack on Iran power plants if Strait of Hormuz isn't reopened
news.summary: Iran and Israel traded attacks on Saturday as the war in the Middle East escalated into a dangerous new direction at the start of its fourth week.

news.title: From satellites to space data centers: Why low earth orbit is attracting billions in investment
news.summary: Big Tech companies including Nvidia and Elon Musk's SpaceX are making large bets on a new layer of critical infrastructure that's emerging above our heads.

news.title: Wealthy consumers are turning to jewelry as an investment, especially colored gemstones
news.summary: Lofty gold prices and market volatility are pushing wealthy consumers toward jewelry. Jewelry, especially rare colored gemstones, is losing appeal as handbags lose appeal.

news.title: I’m 59. My wife and I bought a second home for $484,000 at 6.2% interest. Will this be a drain on our retirement?
news.summary: “I earn an annual salary of $116,000. My wife’s annual income is about $55,000,” he says.

news.title: I’m 76 and won $50,000 in a settlement related to cancer from nuclear waste. What should I do with it?
news.summary: “The money is tax-free and does not affect our income, which comes from investments and Social Security,” she says.

news.title: ‘I’m completely gobsmacked’: My elderly brother has a reverse mortgage — yet he still ran out of money. Do I help?
news.summary: “We simply can’t afford to take on his financial situation,” she said. “My husband and I are both retired and have saved for years.”

news.title: ‘This guy has no manners’: My Airbnb guest requested I buy bacon and beer. The $30 bill remains unpaid. Do I insist?
news.summary: “I don’t want him to retaliate with a bad review,” she says. “I’m not going to let him get away with it.”

news.title: ‘Healthcare is important to me’: I’m worried about relocating to Florida from New Jersey. Are hospitals there under stress?
news.summary: “The issue is not the weather, high insurance premiums or high maintenance fees,” he says. “It’s the cost of living.”
